Why Choose Passages

  • Rated “The Number 1 Rehab in the World” by Health Care Global
  • This is not a 12-Step program. Our program is holistic and individualized
  • You will receive 60-70 hours of one-on-one treatment in one month. We have not found another treatment center that comes close to offering this much one-on-one
  • This is not a cookie cutter program that puts you in group meetings all day
  • We do not subscribe to the disease concept of addiction like most centers do. We believe addiction is a symptom of your underlying conditions
  • We believe it’s counterproductive to call yourself an addict or alcoholic, which is why we don’t use labels such as those to define you
  • You will have a private suite with highspeed internet, a gourmet chef, ocean-view pool, hot tub, tennis court, and a fully equipped gym with a private trainer
  • You’re allowed to keep your cell phone and laptop so you can communicate with family and colleagues
  • Incredible grounds designed for healing
  • Family run treatment center since 2001
  • Tens of thousands of clients have gone through the Passages program
  • Passages is known and respected for delivering superior treatment
  • We honor each person who walks through our doors

The Passages Philosophy

We believe each person who is dependent on alcohol or drugs is being driven by one of these four underlying conditions:

  1. A Chemical Imbalance
  2. Events of the past you have not reconciled
  3. Current conditions you can't cope with
  4. Things you believe that aren't true

The Passages program treats the underlying conditions that are causing you to use so you can maintain long-term sobriety.

More Reasons to Choose Passages

More Reasons to Choose Passages

Passages Malibu was founded in 2001 by father and son, Chris and Pax Prentiss. Before Passages, Pax had a horrific ten-year addiction to heroin, cocaine and alcohol. Pax tried treatment centers that offered the 12-Steps, but they never worked for him, and he would always relapse when he returned home. This was because the treatment centers were not treating the underlying conditions that were causing him to use.

Passages Malibu was founded in 2001 by father and son, Chris and Pax Prentiss. Before Passages, Pax had a horrific ten-year addiction to heroin, cocaine and alcohol. Pax tried treatment centers that offered the 12-Steps, but they never worked for him, and he would always relapse when he returned home. This was because the treatment centers were not treating the underlying conditions that were causing him to use.

Desperate to save Pax’s life, Chris created a holistic program that focused on treating Pax’s underlying conditions. This was something Pax had never had before, and it ended up saving his life. Pax was so grateful for this program that he wanted to offer it to everyone. This led him and his father to open Passages Malibu. The program they designed does not use the 12-Steps. Instead, it offers an abundance of one-on-one holistic therapies that focuses on treating the underlying conditions that are causing you to use. After twenty-four years, Pax still oversees the program and takes admissions calls. You will not find a more dedicated team of people to help you heal. Please call Passages now and ask to speak with Pax so he can answer all your questions about the program and set up your admission. He would love to take your call.

Clinical Excellence Accreditations & Certifications

Passages adheres to strict regulatory requirements, employs the guidance of top addiction professionals, and is constantly improving treatment guidelines in order to successfully and consistently deliver the highest level of quality healthcare services. Passages Malibu and Passages Ventura are both proudly certified and/or accredited by the following prestigious addiction treatment aligned agencies:

The Joint Commission’s Gold Seal of Quality Care
Passages is accredited by The Joint Commission. We have passed all safety and health requirements to ensure the highest level of care available and are honored to hold this highly respectable accreditation.
Learn More

Commission on Accreditation of Rehabilitation Facilities (CARF)
The mission of CARF is to promote the quality, value, and optimal outcomes of services through a consultative accreditation process and continuous improvement services that center on enhancing the lives of persons served.

American Society of Addiction Medicine (ASAM)
ASAM is dedicated to increasing access and improving the quality of addiction treatment, educating physicians and the public, supporting research and prevention, and promoting the appropriate role of physicians in the care of patients with addiction.

The State Department of Healthcare Services
Passages Malibu is licensed by the State Department of Health Care Services to operate an adult residential alcohol and/or drug program. Visit The State Department of Health Care Services website for licensing information.
View Licensing Information

LegitScript Certified
LegitScript Certification takes a holistic look at a provider’s business model, marketing practices, and business affiliations. Passages Malibu represents the highest levels of commercial integrity for healthcare markets.

Clinical Excellence Accreditations & Certifications

 
 
 Passages adheres to strict regulatory requirements, employs the guidance of top addiction professionals, and is constantly improving treatment guidelines in order to successfully and consistently deliver the highest level of quality healthcare
 services. Passages Malibu and Passages Ventura are both proudly certified and/or accredited by the following prestigious addiction treatment aligned agencies: 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 The Joint Commission’s Gold Seal of Quality Care 
 Passages is accredited by The Joint Commission. We have passed all safety and health requirements to ensure the highest level of care available and are honored to hold this
 highly respectable accreditation.
 Learn More 

 

 
 

 

 
 Commission on Accreditation of Rehabilitation Facilities (CARF) 
 The mission of CARF is to promote the quality, value, and optimal outcomes of services through a consultative accreditation process and continuous improvement
 services that center on enhancing the lives of persons served.
 

 

 
 

 

 
 American Society of Addiction Medicine (ASAM) 
 ASAM is dedicated to increasing access and improving the quality of addiction treatment, educating physicians and the public, supporting research and prevention, and promoting the
 appropriate role of physicians in the care of patients with addiction.
 

 

 
 

 

 
 The State Department of Healthcare Services 
Passages Malibu is licensed by the State Department of Health Care Services to operate an adult residential alcohol and/or drug program. Visit The State Department of Health Care Services
 website for licensing information.

Health Insurance Accepted
at Passages Malibu

We can verify your insurance benefits in minutes. Please enter your information in our confidential benefits verification form, and your information will be sent over to the insurance team at Passages Malibu.

Shortly after submitting this form, our admissions team will be in contact to review your benefits. It’s that easy.

Don’t See Your Insurance Provider Listed?

Don’t See Your Insurance Provider Listed?

Do not be discouraged if you are not seeing your insurance provider listed on our website. We take many types of insurance, and you may still qualify for coverage. Please fill out our benefits verification form and we will be in contact shortly with program and pricing options.

Passages Addiction Treatment Programs

When you arrive for treatment at any of our Passages Addiction Treatment Centers, you can expect to receive the most elegant and sophisticated care available anywhere in the world. Our non-12 step addiction therapy is highly exclusive and customized to your specific needs. People from all over the world come to Passages to receive the help they need to break free from addiction and live the life they have always wanted.

SAFELY RELEASE STORED UP TOXINS

Detox Program

During your detox at Passages, our medical staff will be attentive 24/7 as your body rids itself of toxic and addictive substances. We value your health and well-being. Our team of nurses and doctors use the most effective methods and medications to ensure a complete detox in a safe and comfortable setting, where you can feel relaxed as you recover. There is no better place to detox than at Passages.

View Detox Program

HEAL IN A LUXURIOUS SETTING

Residential Program

Wake up to a beautiful sunrise over the Pacific Ocean and feel the coastal breeze throughout the day as you heal from drug and alcohol abuse at Passages. Our 24/7 staff is here to be sure your time at Passages is successful through a variety of non-12 step treatment methods that focus on healing the underlying conditions to your substance abuse related issues. Between sessions, you are welcome to enjoy a swim in one of our heated pools, play tennis with new friends, or relax by the waterfall as you read a book.

View Residential Program

REHAB AT YOUR CONVENIENCE

Outpatient Program

If you would prefer to have the freedom to go home at the end of the day after treatment sessions and have the ability to maintain the discipline to stay the course, outpatient rehab is perfect for you! Our state-of-the-art facilities offer chemical dependency counseling, marriage and family therapy, massage, group therapy, among many other methods in helping you heal the underlying conditions to your substance abuse related issues, all at the convenience of your daily schedule.

View Outpatient Program

LUXURY TRANSITIONAL LIVING

Sober Living Homes

Surrounding yourself with positive influences as you begin to thrive in your sober lifestyle is important. Our sober living programs at Passages offer 24/7 support along with fun activities to keep you from ever feeling bored. We have three sober living homes in Southern California, all of which are beautiful, clean, safe, and provide you with the encouragement you need to transition from rehab and back into society successfully.
